capability_plan.action: Increase non-blocking collectors and connector reuse.
Tune retry windows, jitter, and transient-error handling.
Calibrate concurrency with adaptive workload backpressure.
Improve indexed storage for historical correlation replay.
Expand connector orchestration to leverage high-value multi-source collectors safely.
Harden routing controls and privacy-aware collection profiles.
Expand analyst outputs with richer graph/report artifacts.

recommended_plugins.title: AES Attachment Cipher
recommended_plugins.description: Encrypts or decrypts attachment-like text payloads using AES-CFB.

recommended_plugins.title: ROT13 Attachment Cipher
recommended_plugins.description: Applies ROT13 transform on attachment-like payloads for reversible text masking.

recommended_plugins.title: XOR Attachment Cipher
recommended_plugins.description: Applies XOR transform on attachment-like payloads for reversible obfuscation.

recommended_plugins.title: Darkweb Tor Intelligence
recommended_plugins.description: Collects passive onion references and Tor-aware Ahmia search hints from public investigation context.

recommended_plugins.title: Domain Takeover Risk Probe
recommended_plugins.description: Flags subdomains that look deprovisioned or dangling based on passive DNS resolution signals.

recommended_plugins.title: Header Hardening Probe
recommended_plugins.description: Performs deep security-header assessment on target HTTPS response headers.

recommended_plugins.title: Module Capability Matrix
recommended_plugins.description: Maps plugin-like module signals from source-intel trees into scope-aware insights.

recommended_plugins.title: RDAP Lifecycle Inspector
recommended_plugins.description: Evaluates RDAP status, nameserver metadata, and change recency to surface domain governance risk.

recommended_plugins.title: Security.txt Analyzer
recommended_plugins.description: Parses security.txt content for disclosure channels and policy completeness.

recommended_plugins.title: Signal Fusion Core
recommended_plugins.description: Runs internal connector lanes and merges normalized signals into silinosic_x workflows.

recommended_plugins.title: Subdomain Risk Atlas
recommended_plugins.description: Classifies discovered subdomains by environment and high-risk naming patterns.

recommended_plugins.title: Surface Transport Stability Probe
recommended_plugins.description: Scores transport availability, redirect posture, and probe failures for domain surface resilience.

recommended_plugins.title: Threat Conductor
recommended_plugins.description: Combines correlation, issue distribution, and scan quality into an executive risk signal.
